seo.title: Nano Banana Lite - Fast 1K Google Image Generation | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Generate fast 1K still images and local edits with Nano Banana Lite in MaxVideoAI, routed directly through Google's Gemini image API.

overview: Nano Banana Lite is the fast, efficient 1K member of the Google Nano Banana image family. Use it for high-volume still drafts, social concepts, local image edits, and quick visual exploration before moving selected ideas to Nano Banana 2 or Nano Banana Pro.
pricingNotes: Nano Banana Lite is priced per 1K image. MaxVideoAI shows the exact live quote before generation.

hero.title: Nano Banana Lite - fast 1K image generation
hero.intro: Use the direct Google Lite route for fast still-image drafts, quick local edits, and high-volume creative exploration.

tips.title: Tips and limits
items: Use Lite when speed matters more than 2K or 4K finishing.
Do not enable Search grounding here; use Nano Banana 2 or Pro for grounded workflows.
Use references to preserve subject identity, pose, palette, or product details.
Prompts work best when the edit instruction is short and explicit.

prompts.title: Kinetic street still
prompts.prompt: 1K energetic street-fashion still at night, reflective rain, cyan and amber neon, dynamic low camera angle, editorial magazine lighting.

prompts.title: Local reference edit
prompts.prompt: Keep the subject, pose, and framing from this reference, but replace the jacket with a glossy red technical shell and shift the background to blue hour city lights.

faqs.q: What resolution does Nano Banana Lite support?
faqs.a: Nano Banana Lite supports 1K image output only. Use Nano Banana 2 or Nano Banana Pro for 2K and 4K outputs.

faqs.q: Does Nano Banana Lite support Search grounding?
faqs.a: No. Lite is for fast generation and edits. Use Nano Banana 2 or Nano Banana Pro when the prompt needs Google Search grounding.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for fast 1K drafts, social visuals, and quick image edits.
custom.heroDesc1: Nano Banana Lite keeps the still-image workflow fast and focused: one resolution, direct Google routing, and no Pro-only controls in the composer.
custom.heroDesc2: It is the right first pass when you need many quick creative directions before choosing what deserves a higher-resolution render.
heroHighlights: Fast drafts||Use 1K output for rapid ideation and social concept testing.
Reference edits||Upload source images to preserve subject, product, pose, or palette.
Clean family path||Move approved concepts to Nano Banana 2 or Pro when Search, 2K, or 4K matter.

specSections.title: Lite-specific options
items: Search grounding is not exposed for Lite.
Reference input supports up to 14 images.

custom.promptingTitle: How to prompt Nano Banana Lite
custom.promptingIntro: Keep the request tight: subject, composition, lighting, and the edit target.
strengths: Use it for fast image drafts.
Keep prompts concise and visually direct.
Use references when a subject or object must stay recognizable.
boundaries: Use Nano Banana 2 or Pro for 2K/4K.
custom.relatedSubtitle: Choose the Google image model by output need, not by a video-style score.

relatedItems.title: Nano Banana 2
relatedItems.description: Use for 0.5K to 4K, wider ratios, and optional Search grounding.

relatedItems.title: Nano Banana Pro
relatedItems.description: Use for professional 4K finals, typography, and complex grounded assets.

safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing, or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.

imageExamples.title: Nano Banana Lite image prompt examples
imageExamples.intro: Use these for campaign stills, typography posters, reference edits and 2K-to-4K finals.

items.title: Campaign still
items.prompt: 2K campaign still for an amber perfume bottle on white acrylic, soft studio key light, clean shadow, exact headline "AURA NOIRE" top-left, small logo lockup bottom edge.

items.title: Typography poster
items.prompt: Vertical 4K poster, premium editorial grid, graphite background, exact headline "MIDNIGHT LAUNCH", subhead "LIMITED DROP", crisp hierarchy, generous margins, readable text.

items.title: Reference edit
items.prompt: Using this product reference, keep the shape, logo and proportions. Change the scene to a midnight-blue studio, improve reflections, remove dust and fingerprints.

items.title: 2K to 4K final
items.prompt: Rerun the approved 2K composition as a 4K final. Sharpen fine details, keep typography identical, preserve brand colors, product position and the locked framing.
